completed_tasks.name: Landing page cache-first update
completed_tasks.details: Updated sourcecode-landing/index.html to match v1.33.0 cache-first identity: new h1, hero subtitle, cache section (L1/L2 + commands + agent loop), benchmark numbers (17x/9x), nav link, use cases, pricing. Done in session 33 tail / session 34 start.

completed_tasks.name: fix: cold-start routing — add to _SUBCOMMANDS
completed_tasks.details: cold-start was missing from _SUBCOMMANDS frozenset. _preprocess_args treated 'cold-start' as a path argument → directory_not_found JSON error. Fixed by adding 'cold-start' to _SUBCOMMANDS so Typer routes correctly.

completed_tasks.name: fix: --changed-only returns no_changes JSON when working tree is clean
completed_tasks.details: When git confirmed no uncommitted changes, code fell back to full scan with a stderr-only warning. Output was identical to --compact — agent couldn't distinguish 'no changes' from 'changes found'. Now returns {status: working_tree_clean, no_changes: true, changed_files: [], message: ...} and exits 0. Git-unavailable/error still falls back to full scan.

completed_tasks.name: fix: generate-tests relevant_files filters out test-role files
completed_tasks.details: Test files were included in generate-tests scoring and received +2.0 'existing test' content_boost. High-churn test files (score 0.94-0.96) outranked untested source files, inverting the stated goal. Fixed: filter role=='test' from relevant_files at serialization in cli.py. Test files are already in test_gaps.

completed_tasks.name: feat: RIS fast-path for onboard/explain (session 32 pre-existing)
completed_tasks.details: TaskContextBuilder._try_ris_fast_path(): serves onboard/explain from warm RIS snapshot (<50ms) when git HEAD matches stored RIS. Falls through on any cache miss or error.

completed_tasks.name: feat: cold-start endpoints_hint for Java repos (session 32 pre-existing)
completed_tasks.details: cold-start response now includes endpoints_hint field when repo is Java (pom.xml/build.gradle present) but endpoint index is empty. Guides agents to call get_endpoints.

remaining_tasks.name: Live E2E test: sync workspace → pipx + verify cache commands
remaining_tasks.details: Run bash /private/tmp/sync_to_pipx.sh from normal Terminal (EPERM in Claude Code shell), then: sourcecode cache status /private/tmp/spring-petclinic; sourcecode cache clear /private/tmp/keycloak --yes; sourcecode /private/tmp/keycloak --compact (cold); sourcecode /private/tmp/keycloak --compact (warm — should be < 0.6s). Also verify fixed bugs: sourcecode cold-start from /private/tmp/keycloak, sourcecode . --changed-only on clean repo.

remaining_tasks.name: BUG-C1 — validate async write actually reduces cold latency
remaining_tasks.details: E2E benchmarks: cold run time with keycloak/broadleaf. Async background write (daemon thread + atexit join 5s) added in 1.32.4. Verify no corruption and latency improvement on cold path.

remaining_tasks.name: Publish 1.33.1 to PyPI / Homebrew tap
remaining_tasks.details: Version bumped to 1.33.1 and committed. Needs PyPI publish and Homebrew tap update. Was 1.33.0 in previous handoff.

human_actions_pending.context: Untracked since session 29. No action needed to unblock.

decisions.decision: Cache is the product moat — README, CLI help, and landing page now lead with this
decisions.rationale: Benchmarks (10.5s → 0.6s Keycloak, 2.7s → 0.3s Broadleaf) change sourcecode from an occasional tool to constant agent infrastructure.

decisions.decision: README benchmark numbers: 17x/9x (not 33x/13x from older README)
decisions.rationale: Conservative rounded figures: 10.5s/0.6s = ~17x for Keycloak, 2.7s/0.3s = ~9x for Broadleaf.

decisions.decision: --changed-only on clean repo: return no_changes JSON (not fall back to full scan)
decisions.rationale: Silent fallback is a contract violation — agent cannot distinguish 'no changes' from 'changes found'. Only git-unavailable/error should fall back.

decisions.decision: generate-tests relevant_files filter: output layer (cli.py), not scoring layer (prepare_context.py)
decisions.rationale: Minimal scope. Internal scoring still sees test files for test_set membership checks. Filter at serialization is least invasive.

next_action: Human: run bash /private/tmp/sync_to_pipx.sh from normal Terminal, then verify: sourcecode cold-start (from /private/tmp/keycloak), sourcecode . --changed-only on clean repo, sourcecode cache status. Then publish 1.33.1.
